fields.title: DRY: Remove duplicated createSessionForModelAsync in worker.ts
fields.description: worker.ts has createSessionForModel (Effect) and createSessionForModelAsync (Promise) with identical logic. The async version is called via Effect.tryPromise inside Effect.gen, so it can be replaced with a direct call to createSessionForModel.
fields.close_reason: Replaced createSessionForModelAsync (Promise version) with direct call to createSessionForModel (Effect version) in the model fallback loop. Removed ~25 lines of duplicated session creation logic.
